tool.name: Filter failed datasets

param.name: replacement
param.label: Replace failed elements with this dataset
param.help: If provided, failed elements will be replaced with this dataset

tool.help:
======== Synopsis ========
Removes datasets in the error (red) state from a collection.
=========== Description ===========
This tool takes a dataset collection and filters out (removes) datasets in the failed (red) state. This is useful for continuing a multi-sample analysis when one or more of the samples fails at some point.
Optionally, you can provide a replacement dataset. When a replacement is specified, failed elements are replaced with that dataset instead of being removed.
.. image:: ${static_path}/images/tools/collection_ops/filter_error.svg :alt: Filter failed datasets :width: 500
-----
.. class:: infomark
@QUOTA_USAGE_NOTE@
